title: The Raid Erupts Across Onigashima
description: On pages 13–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Apoo, Luffy, Kaido as The raid erupts across Onigashima as Yamato protects Momonosuke, the Scabbards strike Kaido, and the alliance throws the banquet into war.
scene: The raid erupts across Onigashima as Yamato protects Momonosuke, the Scabbards strike Kaido, and the alliance throws the banquet into war.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We just need to get up there!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Shit!! Things aren't very easy after all!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are all of those flying devil fruit users?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And I know you can handle the rest!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Onigashima Raid Erupts storyline with 10 dialogue beats. The raid erupts across Onigashima as Yamato protects Momonosuke, the Scabbards strike Kaido, and the alliance throws the banquet into war.
